title: Full-Stack Web Development Masterclass
summary: A comprehensive learning path covering frontend development with React, backend with Node.js, and database design with PostgreSQL.

title: Mobile Development with React Native
summary: Learn to build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native, covering UI components, state management, navigation, and native modules.

title: Cloud Architecture and DevOps Essentials
summary: Master cloud deployment, containerization with Docker, Kubernetes orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring best practices.

title: GraphQL API Development
summary: Build modern APIs with GraphQL, including schema design, resolvers, authentication, real-time subscriptions, and best practices.
